title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Panalpina India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Panalpina India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Panalpina India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Panalpina India:
Panalpina India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panalpina India!
